content.question: What is the actual enrollment diversion from state village schools to expanding church-run schools in rural areas, and does this diversion amplify disadvantage concentration in retained state schools?
content.reduction_path: Conduct settlement-level longitudinal analysis (2010-2024) of enrollment flows between state and church schools by rural settlement type, SES of enrolled students, and Roma proportion; quantify composition change in state schools following church-school entry.
